title: Switch the RMS Interface Language to English
summary: Use the RMS language selection control in the top-right corner of the RMS interface to change the displayed language from Chinese to English.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when the RMS interface is visible and the displayed language is Chinese, and the operator needs to switch the interface to English using the top-right language selection control.
not_for: Do not use this procedure if the language selection control cannot be confidently identified on the visible RMS screen.
Do not use this procedure to perform other RMS navigation or configuration changes beyond switching the interface language to English.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Locate the language selection control in the top-right corner of the RMS interface and switch the displayed language to English.

safety_notes: If the language selection control cannot be identified from the visible screen, stop and request guidance rather than guessing.
access_or_tools_needed: Visible RMS home screen or top navigation area

system_preconditions: The RMS interface is open and visible.
The top navigation area or home screen is visible.

visual_references.description: RMS home screen view showing top-right navigation elements, including the language selection control described as the third icon from the right.

steps.title: Locate the language selection control
steps.purpose: Identify the correct RMS control used to change the interface language.
steps.instruction: Look at the top-right corner of the RMS application and locate the language selection control. Use the source guidance that this is the third icon from the right.
steps.expected_result: The operator identifies the language selection control in the top-right corner of the RMS interface.
steps.healthy_condition: The top-right control area is visible and the language selection control can be confidently identified as the third icon from the right.
steps.failure_condition: The operator cannot confidently identify the language selection control from the visible screen.

actions.label: Find language control
actions.exact_action: Look at the top-right corner of the RMS application and locate the language selection control, described as the third icon from the right.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Top-right corner of the RMS home screen and the language selection control position described as the third icon from the right.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and request guidance if the language selection control cannot be identified from the visible screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: On the top right corner is your language selection; sometimes the default language is Chinese, and the third icon from the right can switch it to English.

steps.title: Click the language selection control
steps.purpose: Open or activate the RMS language selection control.
steps.instruction: Click the language selection control in the top-right corner of the RMS interface.
steps.expected_result: The language selection control responds and allows the operator to proceed with changing the displayed language.
steps.healthy_condition: The control is clickable and presents the option needed to change the interface language.
steps.failure_condition: Clicking the control does not respond or does not allow the operator to proceed toward switching to English.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The top-right language selection control referenced by the training slide and transcript.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate for additional support if clicking the control does not allow switching to English.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: On the top right corner is your language selection; sometimes the default language is Chinese, and the third icon from the right can switch it to English.

steps.title: Switch the interface to English
steps.purpose: Change the RMS display language to English.
steps.instruction: Use the language selection control to switch the displayed language to English.
steps.expected_result: The RMS interface language changes to English.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface text displays in English after the language selection is changed.
steps.failure_condition: The interface remains in Chinese or English cannot be selected.

actions.label: Select English
actions.exact_action: Switch the displayed language to English.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate for additional support if the control does not allow switching to English.
Stop if the interface does not change to English after the selection attempt.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: On the top right corner is your language selection; sometimes the default language is Chinese, and the third icon from the right can switch it to English.

success_criteria: The RMS interface language changes to English.
The operator can view the RMS interface in English after using the top-right language selection control.
healthy_conditions: The language selection control is visible in the top-right corner of the RMS interface.
The control can be identified as the third icon from the right.
Selecting the control results in the interface displaying English.
failure_conditions: The language selection control cannot be identified from the visible screen.
Clicking the language selection control does not allow switching to English.
The interface does not change to English after the selection attempt.
escalation_guidance: If the language selection control cannot be identified from the visible screen, stop and request guidance rather than guessing.
If clicking the control does not allow switching to English, escalate for additional support.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: RMS home screen top-right navigation area showing the language selection control location.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: On the top right corner is your language selection; sometimes the default language is Chinese, and the third icon from the right can switch it to English.

missing_details: The source does not provide the exact label text or icon graphic for the language selection control.
The source does not describe any intermediate menu, dropdown, or confirmation behavior after clicking the control.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO considerations apply.
